gap: Gradle project with Kotlin (Quarkus + Kotlin 2.0.21). Agent set compileJava target to 25 but compileKotlin stayed at 21 -> Gradle Kotlin plugin fails: 'Inconsistent JVM-target compatibility detected for tasks compileJava (25) and compileKotlin (21)'. Two-layer wall: (1) JVM-target alignment - compileKotlin must match compileJava; prefer kotlin{jvmToolchain(25)}. (2) Kotlin 2.0.21 cannot emit JVM target 25 (needs >=2.2), and the Kotlin version is pinned by the Quarkus platform BOM, so a raw Kotlin bump is overridden - must bump the Quarkus platform. Agent attempted Kotlin 2.0.21->2.2.0/2.4.0 and JvmTarget.JVM_25 edits; none stuck (BOM override). SKILL.md section G (Gradle track) covers only Java-only Gradle; no Kotlin-coexistence guidance.
decision: logged-only (operator: do not fix this pass)
